title: When I grow up, I’m gonna be outdoors!
summary: Lydia grew up wanting to be outdoors; and then the pandemic made racism more palpable when outside. But wherever the trail goes, she belongs. The post When I grow up, I’m gonna be outdoors! appeared first on Trustees for Alaska .
